step_rationale: ROS-scavenging enzyme; protects against LDL oxidation in atherosclerosis.
mechanism: SOD1 catalyzes superoxide dismutation, reducing oxidative stress and preventing LDL oxidation that would otherwise accelerate plaque lipid-core expansion.

references.title: Impact of Probiotic Lactiplantibacillus plantarum ATCC 14917 on atherosclerotic plaque and its mechanism.
Beneficial effect of combined spironolactone and quinapril treatment on thrombosis and hemostasis in 2K1C hypertensive rats.
references.journal: Journal of physiology and pharmacology : an official journal of the Polish Physiological Society
